summary: Iteration 52 - Tested high-priority features: Buy buttons with login messages/loading states, Pack toggle ON/OFF, Mobile footer language selector. Fixed critical bug in ProductDetailPage.js where variant_id and pack_id were not being passed to addToCart function.
passed_tests: BOTONES: Non-logged user clicking 'Add to Cart' shows toast 'Inicia sesión para añadir productos' with Login button - PASS
BOTONES: Non-logged user clicking 'Buy Now' shows toast 'Inicia sesión para comprar' with Login button - PASS
BOTONES: Logged-in user clicking 'Add to Cart' shows loading toast then 'Added successfully' - PASS (after fix)
BOTONES: Logged-in user clicking 'Buy Now' redirects to /cart - PASS (after fix)
PACKS: Click on pack selects it (green checkbox visible) - PASS
PACKS: Click on selected pack deselects it (toggle OFF) - PASS
PACKS: Price total updates when selecting/deselecting packs (€24.99 → €134.95) - PASS
FOOTER: Mobile (390px) language selector with Globe icon visible - PASS
FOOTER: Click on language selector opens dialog with 11 language options - PASS
FOOTER: Selecting language changes UI (Spanish → 'Todos los Productos', 'Tiendas', etc.) - PASS

bugs_fixed.issue: handleAddToCart and handleBuyNow functions were not passing selectedVariant.variant_id and selectedPack.pack_id to addToCart function
bugs_fixed.fix: Added variantId and packId parameters to addToCart calls
bugs_fixed.impact: Products with variants were failing to add to cart with 400 Bad Request error

critical_code_review_comments: ProductDetailPage.js: Fixed - now correctly passes variant_id and pack_id to addToCart
ProductCard.js: Buy buttons correctly show login required toast for non-logged users
Footer.js: Mobile language selector working correctly with Globe icon and dialog
Pack selection toggle ON/OFF working with visual checkbox indicator
seed_data_creation: Created test user test@example.com with password123 (SHA256 hash)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 52 tested buy buttons, pack toggle, and footer language selector. Key fix: ProductDetailPage.js was not passing variant_id and pack_id to addToCart function, causing 400 errors for products with variants. All features now working correctly. Test user: test@example.com / password123. Producer certificates wizard and admin certificates panel were not tested in this iteration - they require producer/admin login.
features_not_tested: ProducerCertificates.js - Wizard de certificados con 4 pasos (requires producer login)
AdminCertificates.js - Panel de admin con aprobar/rechazar/eliminar (requires admin login)
